title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is an AI agent framework that automates coding workflows by integrating with Jira, GitHub, Slack, Telegram, and Discord. In this demo, a Jira adapter is built live to enable tickets to trigger automated bug fixes and pull requests through dedicated agent conversations.
